meta.title: Orion | Ambassadors
meta.description: Orion was originally owned by Maya before becoming an ambassador at Alveus. Orion sadly passed away in June 2022 after an unfortunate self-inflicted accident in his enclosure.

data.name: Orion
data.story:
Orion was originally owned by Maya before becoming an ambassador at Alveus.

Orion sadly passed away in June 2022 after an unfortunate self-inflicted accident in his enclosure.
data.mission: He is an ambassador for showing how pest control affects wildlife globally and how to conserve major keystone species.
